title: Lincoln Pharmaceuticals posts Rs 11.63 crore profit for Q4
summary: Lincoln Pharmaceuticals announced a slight profit rise for the fourth quarter ending March 31, 2026. Full fiscal year 2025-26 saw over 6 percent growth in consolidated net profit. Revenue from operations also increased year-on-year. The company's board...
thbAction: Use the article as an entry point to pitch THB's commercial visibility layer for territory planning, account prioritization, and next-best-action for pharma leadership teams.
contentHtml:
New Delhi: Healthcare company Lincoln Pharmaceuticals on Thursday reported a marginal increase in profit at Rs 11.63 crore in the fourth quarter ended March 31, 2026.

The company had posted a profit of Rs 11.57 crore in the same period of the previous year, Lincoln Pharmaceuticals said in a statement.

Revenue from operations rose by 13.5 per cent to Rs 183.08 crore in the quarter under review compared to Rs 161.30 crore reported in the last quarter of FY25, it added.

For the full 2025-26 fiscal, Lincoln Pharma reported over 6 per cent growth in consolidated net profit to Rs 87.89 crore compared to the net profit of Rs 82.35 crore in FY25.

Revenue from operations for FY26 was reported at Rs 704.48 crore as compared to revenue of Rs 645.71 crore reported in FY25, registering a growth of 9.10 per cent Y-o-Y, the statement said.

The company said its board has recommended a dividend of 18 per cent, Rs 1.80 per share on the face value of Rs 10 per share for the FY 2025-26.

The company said it is targeting a revenue of Rs 1,000 crore within the next three years, driven by business expansion into high-value product lines and entry into new markets. PTI
